name: Sucre a La Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the last three in a large saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly. The syrup will swell at the beginning of cooking, but it will soon settle down.
3. The fudge will be done when a candy thermometer reaches 240 degrees F or when a drop of it in cold water remains soft. Let the fudge cool.
4. Add butter, vanilla, and nuts to taste, and stir until creamy.
5. Spread into a buttered pan.
